name: Dean's Drive-Thru Pawn Shop
description_short: Oklahoma City's oldest pawn shop since 1968, offering collateral-based loans and a unique drive-thru service with an on-site US Post Office.
description_long:
Dean's Drive-Thru Pawn Shop has operated in Oklahoma City for over 50 years, establishing itself as a longstanding community fixture since 1968. The shop is located at 2617 S Robinson Ave and maintains regular business hours Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM. As a traditional pawn operation, Dean's provides quick access to cash by accepting collateral such as jewelry, electronics, and other valuables.

The company offers standard pawn shop services including collateral-based loans and the purchase of items of value. A distinctive feature is their drive-thru service window, allowing customers to conduct transactions without leaving their vehicles. Additionally, Dean's hosts a United States Post Office Contract Unit inside the store, enabling customers to access postal services (stamps, mail services, etc.) during business hours, though Registered Mail and Money Orders are not available through their location.

Dean's differentiates itself through convenience and longevity. The drive-thru model is unusual for pawn shops and streamlines the lending process. Their establishment as "OKC's oldest pawn shop" suggests deep community roots and customer trust built over five decades of continuous operation. The integration of postal services creates a multi-purpose destination.

As a pawn shop, Dean's serves customers needing immediate cash but should be understood as a collateral-based lender, not a credit-building solution. Borrowers must surrender personal items as security and repay loans to reclaim them. No information is provided about loan terms, interest rates, or repayment periods on their website, which are critical details for assessing affordability.
address: 2617 S Robinson Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73109

company_info.headquarters: 2617 S Robinson Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73109

pros: Drive-thru service window for convenient, contactless transactions
Oklahoma City's oldest pawn shop with 50+ years of continuous operation
On-site US Post Office Contract Unit for combined services
Located in accessible urban area (South Robinson Ave, OKC)
Quick cash access without credit checks
cons: No interest rates, loan terms, or fee information disclosed on website
Limited hours (weekdays only, no weekend service)
Requires personal collateral—items are forfeited if loan not repaid
No mention of loan amounts, repayment periods, or default consequences
Post Office services exclude Registered Mail and Money Orders
best_for: Customers in Oklahoma City needing same-day emergency cash with collateral available
People seeking quick pawn transactions via drive-thru without entering the store
Community members combining postal needs with pawn services in one location
diagnosis: Dean's is best for Oklahoma City residents with valuable collateral who need immediate cash and prefer drive-thru convenience. The critical caveat is the complete absence of publicly disclosed loan terms, rates, and conditions—borrowers must visit in person or call (405)239-2774 to understand the actual cost and terms of borrowing.
services: Purchase of jewelry, electronics, and valuables
US Postal Service stamps and mail services
US Postal Service bill payment services
Quick cash access without credit requirements
